title: Fanout implementation of all 11 open issues in parallel
description: Spawn parallel sub-agents for each open GitHub issue. Each task gets an isolated worktree, implements, and opens its own PR.

tasks.title: Improve memory learning quality from feedback and repeated signals
acceptance: Capture user feedback on memory fragments (thumbs up/down or similar confidence signal)
Track repeated appearance of the same signal / topic as reinforcement
Surface a quality score per memory fragment that decays/increases based on feedback/usage/repetition
Add a review queue interface to inspect, edit, or prune low-quality memories

tasks.title: Build UI for View explorer, memory review, and processor traces
tasks.scope: UI, View explorer, memory review, processor traces
acceptance: View explorer UI with list / grid / search of all visible and archived views
Memory review UI showing fragments, confidence, source, and allow edit/merge/delete
Processor traces UI (timeline of what the agent processed, when, and why)

tasks.title: Implement proactive action layer with autonomy policy and outcomes
acceptance: Define autonomy levels: suggest only / suggest and execute / silent
Policy engine that matches context to autonomy level
After any proactive action, record the outcome (success, partial, failed, user cancelled)
User can override / revert any action within N seconds

tasks.title: Build current-page automation router for DOM, vision, and debugger tools
tasks.scope: DOM, vision, debugger tools, current-page automation router
acceptance: Given any web page, route to: DOM inspector, screenshot/vision, or Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) based on the task
Unified API: describe what you want, the router picks the best tool / combination
Return structured results (elements, coordinates, text, image) regardless of tool used

tasks.title: Polish Chrome ACP ambient UX and custom prompt buttons
tasks.scope: Chrome ACP, ambient UX, custom prompt buttons
acceptance: Ambient indicator (subtle, non-intrusive) when the agent is active on a tab
Contextual quick-action buttons (e.g. Summarize, Extract, Remind Me, Ask) based on the page
Custom prompt buttons user can define / pin / reorder

tasks.title: Complete YouTube learning loop with fragments and review queue
tasks.scope: YouTube, learning loop, fragments, review queue
acceptance: Detect YouTube video open and extract transcript / metadata / key topics
Create learning fragments from the video (summary, key points, concepts)
Add to a review queue with spaced-repetition-like scheduling
UI to see all video learning items, mark as learned, review later

tasks.title: Implement scheduled AI batch layer for work/project synthesis
tasks.scope: scheduled AI, batch layer, work/project synthesis
acceptance: Schedule periodic batch processing of all active project data (inbox, tasks, notes, browser history)
Generate synthesis output: what changed, what's urgent, what's overlapping
Store synthesis as a new fragment with timestamp and source list
User can configure/adjust schedule (hourly, twice daily, daily)
Push notification / ambient surface of new synthesis

tasks.title: Implement generated project inbox, tasks, and decisions views
tasks.scope: proactive agent, project inbox, tasks, decisions views
acceptance: Automatically generate a project-level inbox from recent activity (browser, notes, messages)
Auto-extract tasks from that inbox and surface them in a task list
Auto-extract decisions from that inbox and surface them in a decisions log
All views are read/write and sync bidirectionally with their source

tasks.title: Add end-to-end dogfood scenarios for proactive context workflows
tasks.scope: end-to-end testing, dogfood scenarios, proactive context workflows
acceptance: Write at least 3 real end-to-end scenarios that exercise the proactive loop: trigger -> context capture -> processing -> action (or suggestion) -> outcome recording
Each scenario runs in a real or mocked environment (allow both)
Scenarios must cover: scheduled batch, YouTube learning, and memory improvement from feedback
CI job exists that runs these scenarios on every push
Each scenario reports pass/fail and leaves a trace artifact for debugging

tasks.title: Productize Screenpipe non-browser current surface context
tasks.scope: Screenpipe, non-browser current surface context, productization
acceptance: Integrate screenpipe API for non-browser context (text on screen, app windows, audio transcriptions)
Normalize and ingest screenpipe output into the same memory/fragment system
Provide a settings panel to enable/disable screenpipe sources and control frequency
Handle privacy: local-only, no cloud upload, user can delete/pause

tasks.title: Product direction: real-time ambient layer with @info inline invoke
tasks.scope: product direction, real-time ambient layer, @info inline invoke
acceptance: Design doc / RFC for the real-time ambient layer
Proof of concept for @info inline invoke (anywhere in any text field, any interface)
Hook into the agent to accept inline context and return inline output
Define and document the interaction model, permissions, and boundaries
